title: PokéAPI Resources, URL API, Pagination Shapes, and Fair-Use Policy · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Url Construction
summary: User input becomes a full fetch destination, URL strings are concatenated, pagination fields are assumed present, and repeated commands bypass the API request to cache every resource. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts url construction increment in fixed-origin typed PokéAPI request policy. Learners progress through predicti…
objectives: Use URL and URLSearchParams for encoded path and limit or offset values while rejecting slash, control, oversized, and unexpected input.
Validate resource kind, numeric identifier or canonical constrained name, and preserve requested versus resolved identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
